news.title: All six crew members killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq
news.description: The US Central Command says all six crew members died after a refuelling aircraft went down over western Iraq.

news.title: First image emerges of Andrew, Mandelson and Epstein together
news.description: The image shows Lord Mandelson and the former prince in bathrobes sitting on wooden decking with Epstein.

news.title: Petrol retailers in row with government over 'rip off' accusations
news.description: They briefly threatened to pull out of a government meeting, accusing ministers of using "inflammatory language" over rising fuel prices.

news.title: Winners, Sinners and record breakers: 17 fun facts about this year's Oscars
news.description: Sinners, Marty Supreme, Hamnet and One Battle After Another are among the films in contention this year.

news.title: Husband who killed wife and buried her in the garden jailed for life
news.description: Alireza Askari did everything in his power to cover up the "cold-blooded murder" of Paria Veisi.
